{{Quote|Then tell me your mission so that if you falter I can abandon you and complete it.|Shaker to Ben Skywalker|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>}}
'''Shaker''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Drewwa spaceport]] maintenance [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that accompanied [[Ben Skywalker]] on his [[Mission for the Amulet of Kalara|mission]] to find the [[Amulet of Kalara]] on [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]]. During the search, Shaker became a kind of conscience for Ben, wondering why he would leave a little girl stranded on a dangerous planet.

Shaker was left by Ben on Drewwa to take care of [[Kiara Olvidan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
